author: b.hartnett
content: Does the BAL EIP mandate that the List[StorageChange] field of each SlotChanges tuple is non empty? It wouldn't make sense to add SlotChange with an empty change set so I imagine that this has been implied up to this point but it might make sense to enforce this rule. Should clients validate that the change set is non empty in the BAL validation?

author: raxhvl
content:
You mean something like this

```
...
"storage_changes": [
      {
        "slot": "0x02",
        "slot_changes": []          // empty inner list
      }
    ]
...
```

The EIP doesnt enforce this validation.  Yeah this is meaningless and bloats the BAL, agree we should add it to the spec.

author: danceratopz
content: That was fast! Adding to the ACDT agenda!
